design_philosophy: Authority, clarity, and function-first. The UI mimics a high-end control room or a Swiss poster. No unnecessary decorations, gradients, or soft shadows. Tension is created through stark contrasts, strict grids, and purposeful negative space.

typography.scale_rules: Do not exceed text-5xl for headers. The gap between heading and subheading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps (e.g., H1 text-4xl -> Sub text-lg).

colors.rules: 95% of the UI must be monochrome (Stark White, Zinc greys, Black). Color is Function Only. Use International Klein Blue (#002FA7) for primary CTAs and Signal Red (#FF2A2A) for destructive actions or absence alerts. No gradients. Never use pure #808080.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4)
layout_and_spacing.container_padding: Generous (p-6, p-8, p-12). Containers with borders MUST have internal padding.
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid border-zinc-200 or border-zinc-800. Expose the skeleton.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Sharp edges. rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px-4px). NO pill shapes.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: NO soft shadows. Use hard structural shadows if necessary (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]) or stick to flat 1px borders.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, dense content, and tables. Center-align only major hero statements or standalone QR codes.

components.buttons: Flat background, sharp corners (rounded-none). High contrast. Primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#00227A]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-black text-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white.
components.cards: Cardless or Technical Borders. border border-zinc-200 bg-white p-6. No shadow. On hover, slightly darken border to border-black.
components.tables: Dense, highly legible. border-collapse. Bottom border on rows (border-zinc-200). Header text should be tiny, uppercase, tracking-widest.
components.inputs: Shadcn inputs customized. rounded-none, border-zinc-300, focus:border-black focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black.
components.modals: Solid white background, strict black border, stark backdrop (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm).
components.navigation: Admin/Teacher sidebars should be ultra-clean. Either dark mode sidebar (#09090B) with white content, or pure white sidebar with 1px right border. Active state highlighted with a stark #002FA7 left-border.
components.qr_attendance_view: Make the QR code massive and central on the Teacher's screen. Frame it with a thick technical border (border-4 border-black).
third_party_libraries: recharts (Charts for Admin dashboard - use monochrome bars + 1 accent color)

motion.hover: Instant or very fast (duration-150) color swaps. High contrast shifts.

icons.style: Technical, consistent stroke width (1.5px or 2px). Use primarily for wayfinding, do not over-decorate.

media.rules: Images should feel architectural or candid. Hero images must have max overlay opacity of bg-black/40 if used with text.

image_urls.description: Minimalist Swiss poster style abstract geometric composition, high contrast. Use as a split-screen background for the Login page.
Abstract grid system, thin technical lines on stark white. Can be used at very low opacity (5%) in the background of empty states or headers.
Group of students on campus. Can be used in announcements or profile empty states.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Use kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='generate-qr-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: NOTE: You are working with .js and .jsx files, not .tsx. Implement all React components using standard ES6+ JavaScript. Do not use TypeScript types.
Install 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'Satoshi' via fontsource or Google Fonts if available, else use Space Grotesk and Inter as fallbacks.
DO NOT use rounded-md, rounded-lg, or rounded-full for structural elements. Strict adherence to rounded-none or rounded-sm.
For the QR Code feature: Use 'qrcode.react' or similar. Design the Teacher's 'Generate QR' screen like a flight departure board—large, high-contrast, impossible to miss.
Student Location Attendance logic: Use the Geolocation API. Handle the loading state and permission denied state gracefully with high-contrast UI alerts.
Implement Shadcn UI, but strip out the default subtle borders/shadows and replace them with sharp, 1px black/zinc borders.
Forms: Left-align labels. Inputs should stretch full width of their container. Submit buttons should be full-width block buttons in primary color.
